title: Income-tax Act, 2025: A New Era in Indian Taxation Begins
content:
# Income-tax Act, 2025: A New Era in Indian Taxation Begins

Ek important update hai. Income-tax Department ne officially confirm kiya hai ki naya Income-tax Act, 2025, ab April 1, 2026 se poore desh mein lagu ho gaya hai.

Here's what you need to know:

*   **Replacement of Old Act:** This landmark legislation officially replaces the six-decade-old Income-tax Act, 1961.
*   **Effective Date:** The Income-tax Act, 2025 has come into force from April 1, 2026, marking a significant shift in India's direct tax framework.
*   **Impact:** This is a fundamental legislative change that will significantly impact all taxpayers and tax professionals across India, aiming for a simpler, more transparent, and taxpayer-friendly system.
*   **Official Resources:** The Income-tax Department's official website has updated its Frequently Asked Questions (FAQs) on the objective and scope of the new Act, with the latest review on April 3, 2026.
*   **Further Details:** A press release dated March 31, 2026, titled "Income-tax Act, 2025 comes into force from 1st April, 2026," is also available under the "Latest Updates" section of the Income Tax Department's website.
*   **Key Changes:** The new Act introduces the concept of 'Tax Year' replacing the 'Previous Year' and 'Assessment Year', aims to simplify statutory language, improve structural clarity, and reduce interpretational disputes.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Press Release on Income-tax Act, 2025 here](https://www.incometax.gov.in/iec/foportal/press-release)

*Published on: 4 April 2026*
